column1: # Single source of truth for packages across all OSes.
# Columns: name  macos  arch  ubuntu        (whitespace-separated, one tool per row)
# Cell token tells the engine HOW to install on that OS:
#   name           native package (brew formula / pacman / apt)
#   flatpak:ID     Flatpak app from Flathub (Linux GUI)
#   custom:NAME    non-trivial install -> install_NAME in packages/custom-<os>.sh
# After editing the macos column, run packages/gen-brewfile.sh to refresh Brewfile.
# GUI apps (Flatpak on Linux, cask on macOS)
